item.description: 206. Reverse Linked List # 题目 # Reverse a singly linked list. 题目大意 # 翻转单链表 解题思路 # 有两种解题方法，一是循环、二是递归。 代码 # 循环 # /** * Definition for singly-linked list. * function ListNode(val, next) { * this.val = (val===undefined ? 0 : val) * this.next = (next===undefined ? null : next) * } */ /** * @param {ListNode} head * @return {ListNode} */ var reverseList = function(head) { let prev = null; let cur = head; while(cur !
